blocks.text: I  WANT  A DIVORCE .
THERE  IS  NO SUCH  PRECEDENT , EMPRESS .
blocks.translation: لا يوجد سابقة كهذه، يا إمبراطورة.

blocks.text: GOOD .  THEN THIS  CAN  BE  THE FIRST  TIME  IT HAPPENS .
blocks.translation: حسناً، إذن لتكن هذه هي المرة الأولى.

blocks.text: WHAT  ARE  YOU SAYING ... ?
OR  I  COULD BE  THE  FIRST  IN A  DIFFERENT REGARD .
blocks.translation: أو قد أكون الأولى من نوعٍ آخر.

blocks.text: FOR  INSTANCE ,
I  COULD  BE THE  WIFE  WHO COULDN'T  ENDURE  A TEDIOUS  DIVORCE PROCEEDING ...
blocks.translation: قد أكون الزوجة التي لم تحتمل وطأة إجراءات الطلاق المملة...

blocks.text: cocAND  MURDERED HER  HUSBAND .
I  THOUGHT MY  EXISTENCE  HAD BEEN  FORGOTTEN AFTER  THAT .
I'M  GLAD  TO SEE  YOU  IN  SUCH GOOD  HEALTH ,
茶茶
GRANDMOTHER .
淡淡
OT
EMPEROR  OF  MARESHAL CARMINE  MARESHAL
LIKEWISE ,  YOUR MAJESTY .
blocks.translation: وَأَنتَمَا عَلَى مِثْلٍ، يَا جَلَالَةَ المَلِكِ.

blocks.text: THERE'S NO  NEED  FOR FORMALITIES .  YOU  ARE MY  GRANDMOTHER , AFTER  ALL .
blocks.translation:
لَيْسَ مِنَ الضَّرورَةِ تَرَعْرُعُ الْمَجْلِسِ.
فَأَنْتِ، بَعْدَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ، جَدَّتِي.

blocks.text: I  ABANDONED SUCH  TIES  ON  THE  DAY  I DECLARED  MY  DIVORCE AT  THE  GRAND CATHEDRAL .
blocks.translation: تَرَكْتُ تِلْكَ الرِّباطَ يَوْمَ أَعْلَنْتُ طَلَاقِي فِي الْكَاتِدْرَائِيَّةِ الْعَظِيمَةِ.

blocks.text: YOUR  MAJESTY  SHOULD ALSO  ADDRESS  ME  AS LADY  AURELIAN  NOW .
blocks.translation: يجب على مقامكم السامي أن تناديني الآن بالسيدة أورليان.

blocks.text: I  ENJOYED THE  FRUIT  YOU SENT  US ,
blocks.translation: لقد أسعدني الثمر الذي أرسلتموه لنا,

blocks.text: BUT  I  WAS  UNAWARE IT  WAS  GROWN  WITH VONERACKOL'S BLESSING .
blocks.translation: لكني لم أكن أعلم أنه قد نال بركة فونيراكول.

blocks.text: I  SIMPLY  WANTED TO  SEND  RIENNA'S BEAUTIFUL  FRUIT  TO  MY CHILDREN , BUT  THIS  JUST HAD  TO  HAPPEN ...
blocks.translation: كنت أرغب ببساطة في إرسال ثمر رينا الجميل إلى أولادي، غير أن هذا كان لا مفر منه...

blocks.text: IT'S  JUST  A MISUNDERSTANDING .
A  MISUNDERSTANDING ?
SO  THE  SWORD THAT  VANISHED  FROM THE  IMPERIAL  PALACE  AT THE  SAME  TIME  AS YOUR  DIVORCE ...
blocks.translation: فالسيف الذي اختفى من القصر الإمبراطوري في الوقت نفسه مع طلاقك...

blocks.text: ... AND  FOSTINE'S UNUSUALLY  BOUNTIFUL HARVEST ...
... AREN'T CONNECTED  AT ALL ?  IS  THAT  WHAT YOU'RE  SAYING ?
blocks.translation: ... ألا ترتبطان أبداً؟ هل هذا ما تقول؟

blocks.text: SCRUNCH
I  ASSURE YOU  THAT  I  HAVE NOTHING  TO  BE ASHAMED  OF .
blocks.translation: أَؤكّد لك أنني لا أخجل من شيء.

blocks.text: YOU KNOW THAT  I  LEFT EVERYTHING  BEHIND AT  THE  IMPERIAL PALACE ...
blocks.translation: تعلم أنّي تركتُ كل شيء خلفي في القصر الإمبراطوري...

blocks.text: ... THE  DAY  I ABANDONED  THE MARESHAL NAME .
blocks.translation: ... في اليوم الذي تخليتُ فيه عن اسم المارشال.

blocks.text: THEN  WHERE  IS  THE SWORD  NOW ?
LEAN
I'M  NOT  THE  ONE WHO  HAS  IT .
WHAT  DO YOU  MEAN  BY THAT ?
ONE  OF  MY VILLAGERS  HAS FORMED  A  PACT  WITH THAT  SWORD .
blocks.translation: أحد قروييّ قد عقد عهدًا مع ذلك السيف.

blocks.text: YOU  EXPECT  ME  TO BELIEVE  THAT ?
GRIT
YOU  CAN INTERROGATE  AN  OLD WOMAN  LIKE  ME  ALL YOU  WANT ,  BUT  IT'S THE  TRUTH ...
blocks.translation: يمكنك استجوابي - امرأة عتيقة مثلي - ما شئت، لكنها الحقيقة...

blocks.text: SIGH
HER  NAME  IS RIENNA ,
AND  SHE'S AN  ORDINARY FARMER .
COUNTRY  LIFE  WITH HIS  SEXY  MAJESTY
Art  by :  SEOLAM Original  Novel  by  :  Irui Adaptation  by :  2B
blocks.translation: الرسوم: سيوغام الرواية الأصلية: إيروي التكييف: ٢ب

blocks.text: Ep .  5
SO ,  UM ... ARE  YOU  SURE YOU'RE  HERE  TO SEE  ME ?
blocks.translation: فـ، هـم... هل أنت متأكّد أنك جئت لرؤيتي؟

blocks.text: THAT'S  RIGHT , MISS  RIENNA .
HE  DOESN'T  SEEM LIKE  A  COMMONER , BUT  HE'S  BEING  POLITE TO  ME ...
blocks.translation: لا يبدو كعادي، لكنه يعاملني بأدب...

blocks.text: AND  HE  JUST CALLED ME  A KITTEN-- NO , A  CAT ...
HIC ...
GETTING CALLED  A  KITTEN BY SUCH  A  HANDSOME WAS  ON  MY  BUCKET MAN LIST !
blocks.translation: أن يناديني بذلك الوسيم بـ"الهرّة" كان على قائمة أمنياتي!

blocks.text: BUT  IT  ONLY  HALF CAME  TRUE ...
UH ...  MISS RIENNA ?
OH !
I'LL  HEAR WHAT  THIS  IS ABOUT  RIGHT OUTSIDE .
blocks.translation: سأصغي لما يدور في الخارج فورًا.

blocks.text: I  TRUST  THAT  YOU AREN'T  A  RUFFIAN  WHO ENTERS  A  HOME  WHERE A  WOMAN  LIVES  BY HERSELF .
blocks.translation: أثق أنك لست ولداً شقيًا يدخُل بيت امرأة تسكن وحدها.

blocks.text: YOU  INSOLENT LITTLE ... !
HUH ?
SURELY !
YOU'RE  NOT SO  SHAMELESS  AS  TO SHOW  UP  UNANNOUNCED AT  THIS  HOUR  AND  THEN DEMAND  HOSPITALITY !
blocks.translation: لست ممن يجرؤ على الحضور فجأة في مثل هذا الوقت ثم يطلب الضيافة!

blocks.text: WHAT ?!
ENOUGH .
HE  MUST  BE  A REALLY  IMPORTANT PERSON ...
blocks.translation: لا بد أنَّه شخصٌ ذا شأنٍ عظيم...

blocks.text: WHAT  COULD  HE WANT  WITH  ME ?
IS  HE  AFTER MY FARMLAND OR  MY  FARMING TECHNIQUES ?
blocks.translation: هل يرنو إلى أراضيَّ الزراعية أم إلى أسرار زراعي؟

blocks.text: I  AM ...
I  JUST  WON'T FALL  FOR  WHATEVER HE  SAYS !
... THE  OWNER  OF THAT  SWORD  YOU HAVE  THERE .
I  CAME  TO  GET IT  BACK .
YOU  HAVE  AN OWNER ,  RIRI ?!
THAT'S PREPOSTEROUS ! YOU'RE  MY  ONLY MASTER !
blocks.translation: هذا لهو عبث! أنت مولاي الوحيد!

blocks.text: HE  SAYS  THAT'S NOT  TRUE .
PSST
WHISPER
YOU  JERK !  YOU  WERE TWO - TIMING  ME ?
blocks.translation: يا وغد! هل كنت تغدر بي؟

blocks.text: AND  YOU ,  MÁDE SUCH  A  FUSS  ABOUT ME  JUST  TOUCHING A  KNIFE !
blocks.translation: وأنت، تصنع ضجة كبيرة فقط لأنني لمستُ سكينا!

blocks.text: HEY !  MASTER ,  HE DIDN'T  SAY  ANYTHING LIKE  THAT !
blocks.translation: هيه! سيدي، لم يقل شيئًا من هذا القبيل!

blocks.text: ARGUE
BICKER
WHY  DO  YOU JUST  ASSUME  I'M TWO - TIMING  YOU ?
BECAUSE I  TRUST  HIS FACE !
QUARREL
ARGUE
SINCE  WHEN HAVE  YOU  CARED SO  MUCH  ABOUT APPEARANCES ?
blocks.translation: منذ متى صار للظاهر هذا القدر من الأهمية لديك؟

blocks.text: ARE  YOU  TALKING TO  THE  SWORD RIGHT  NOW ?
HUH ?
HIS  MASTER CAN'T  EVEN  TELL THAT ?
AHEM !
I  DO  KNOW THAT  IT'S  A  SWORD WITH  A  WILL  OF ITS  OWN .
blocks.translation: أدرك تمامًا أنه سيفٌ ذو إرادة مستقلة.

blocks.text: HM ...
YOU'RE  RIGHT . HE'S  A  VERY  QUIET AND  RESERVED SWORD .
blocks.translation: أنت محق، إنه سيف هادئ ومتزن للغاية.

blocks.text: YES ...
YOU'RE  LYING ABOUT  BEING  HIS MASTER ,  AREN'T YOU ?
blocks.translation: ألا تكذب حين تقول إنك سيده؟

blocks.text: WHO  WOULD CALL  THIS  MASSIVE NARCISSIST QUIET ?
blocks.translation: من يصف هذا النرجسي الجبار بأنه هادئ؟

blocks.text: MASSIVE NARCISSIST ?  SO THAT'S  HOW  YOU SEE  ME ?!
blocks.translation: نرجسي جبار؟ هل هذا ما تراني عليه؟!

blocks.text: -FWIP
WHAT  DO  YOU REALLY  WANT WITH  ME ?
IF  YOU  LIE  ONE MORE  TIME ,  I  WON'T OPEN  THIS  DOOR AGAIN .
blocks.translation: إن كذبت مرة أخرى، فلن أفتح هذا الباب ثانية.

blocks.text: SQUEEZE
SIGH
MY  NAME  IS CARMINE .
I  AM  LADY AURELIAN'S GRANDSON .
LADY  AUREL ... ? WHO ?  I  DON'T  KNOW ANYONE  BY  THAT NAME .
blocks.translation: السيدة أوريلي...؟ من؟ لا أعرف أحداً بهذا الاسم.

blocks.text: AURELIAN  IS THE  NAME  OF  THE GOVERNOR OF FOSTINE .
OH ,  GRANNY !
JOLT
" GRANNY " ?!
WE'VE  BEEN HAVING  TEA  TOGETHER  FOR YEARS ,  AND  SHE  TOLD  ME TO  JUST  CALL  HER GRANNY .
blocks.translation: لقد ارتشفنا الشاي معاً لسنوات، وأوصتني أن أدعوها جدتي فقط.

blocks.text: ANYWAY ,
THE  TRUTH  IS THAT  SWORD  IS  A PRECIOUS  ARTIFACT THAT  ONLY  THE  HEAD OF  MY FAMILY CAN  USE .
blocks.translation: الحقيقة أنّ السيف قطعة ثمينة لا يُسمح باستخدامها إلّا لرئيس عشيرتي.

blocks.text: AHEM
AFTER  GRANDMOTHER GOT  DIVORCED  AND  LEFT  US , THE  SWORD  DISAPPEARED ALONG  WITH  HER .
blocks.translation: بعد أن طلّقت جدّتنا وتركتنا، اختفى السيف معها.

blocks.text: SWEAT
DRIP
AHA !  SO  THAT'S WHY  HE  IMMEDIATELY CALLED  ME  A  KITTEN-- I  MEAN ,  A  CAT BURGLAR .
blocks.translation: آها! لهذا السبب وصفني فورًا بالكتّيّة... أعني، باللصّ القطة.

blocks.text: THIS  JERK  OF A  SWORD  SECRETLY RAN  AWAY ,  AND  BECAUSE OF  HIM ,  GRANNY  AND  I ARE  TREATED  LIKE CRIMINALS !
blocks.translation: ذلك السيف الحقير فرّ خفية، وبسببه تُعامل جدتي وأنا كالمجرمين!

blocks.text: YOU  WILL BE  HANDSOMELY REWARDED .
SHAKE
UM ...  I  UNDERSTAND WHAT'S  GOING  ON ,  MORE OR  LESS ,  BUT  EVEN  IF  I WANTED  TO  RETURN THIS  TO  YOU ...
blocks.translation: همم... أدرك ما يجري، إلى حد ما، ولكن حتى لو رغبتُ في إعادته إليك...

blocks.text: NO !  I'M  NOT LEAVING !  I'LL  STAY BY  YOUR  SIDE  UNTIL YOUR  HAIR  TURNS WHITE !
blocks.translation: لا! لن أغادر! سأظل إلى جانبك حتى يتحول شعرك إلى الأبيض!

blocks.text: FWIP
YOU  REALLY  ARE HIS  MASTER ...
MURMUR
DAZED
THE  SWORD MOVED  ON ITS  OWN ?
blocks.translation: هل تحرك السيف من تلقاء نفسه؟

blocks.text: I'VE  NEVER SEEN  ANYTHING LIKE  THAT ...
blocks.translation: لم أرَ شيئًا مماثلًا من قبل...

blocks.text: WHISPER
HMPH !!!
THEY  JUST DECIDED  I  WAS  A  FAMILY
THEY JUST DECIDED I WAS A FAMILY HEIRLOOM ON THEIR OWN . THEY'VE NEVER ACTUALLY CARED FOR ME !
blocks.translation: لقد قرروا بأجمعهم أنني مجرد تراث عائلي. لم يسبق لهم أن اهتموا بي حقاً!

blocks.text: WAAAH
PUSH
IF  HE'S  TRULY MY  MASTER ,  ASK  HIM TO  SAY  MY  REAL NAME !
blocks.translation: إذا كان فعلاً ســيدي، فليُجبني باسمي الحقيقي!

blocks.text: SOB
LIGH ...
RUI  WANTS YOU  TO  SAY  HIS REAL  NAME .
blocks.translation: يريد روي منك أن تقول اسمه الحقيقي.

blocks.text: LIH ...
THE  SWORD'S REAL  NAME ?
RUI ...
HEY ,  HE KNOWS  YOUR REAL  NAME .
HE  PASSED ,  AND  IT HAD  NOTHING  TO  DO WITH  HIS  LOOKS
blocks.translation: لقد اجتاز الاختبار، ولم يكن ذلك بسبب مظهره.

blocks.text: WHAT  DO  YOU MEAN ?  ALL  HE  SAID WAS  " RUI " !
blocks.translation: ماذا تعني؟ كل ما قاله هو "روي" فقط!

blocks.text: AND  BESIDES , YOU  CALLED  ME THAT  IN  FRONT OF  HIM !
blocks.translation: وعلاوة على ذلك، لقد ناديتني بذلك أمامه!

blocks.text: WELL ,  AN  ORDINARY PERSON  COULD  NEVER MEMORIZE  YOUR  FULL NAME  ANYWAY .
blocks.translation: حسناً، لا أحد عادي يستطيع حفظ اسمك الكامل على أي حال.

blocks.text: HOW  COULD YOU  DO  THIS  TO ME ,  MASTER ?!
WEEP
IN  ANY  CASE , I  CAN'T  GIVE  YOU THE  SWORD  BECAUSE  HE SAYS  THAT  YOU'RE  NOT HIS  MASTER .  NOW PLEASE  LEAVE .
blocks.translation: على أي حال، لا أستطيع أن أمنحك السيف لأنّه يقول إنك لست سيده. أرجو منك المغادرة الآن.

blocks.text: TRIUMPHANT
MISS  RIENNA .
THAT  SWORD'S  VALUE AND  SIGNIFICANCE  ARE BEYOND  WHAT  YOU CAN  IMAGINE ,
blocks.translation: قيمة هذا السيف وعظمته تفوق ما تتصور.

blocks.text: SO  I  CAN'T  JUST LEAVE  LIKE  THIS .
blocks.translation: لذا، لا أستطيع الرحيل هكذا ببساطة.

blocks.text: I  MUST  TAKE THAT  SWORD ,  EVEN  IF IT  MEANS  RESORTING TO  UNDERHANDED METHODS .
blocks.translation: يجب أن أحصل على ذلك السيف، حتى وإن اضطررت إلى اللجوء إلى أساليب ماكرة.

blocks.text: UNDERHANDED METHODS ?
HE  HAS  A  WILL  OF  HIS OWN ,  SO  I  CAN'T  IGNORE HIS  WISHES  AND  HAND HIM  OVER  TO  YOU .
blocks.translation: له إرادته الخاصة، فلا أستطيع تجاهل رغبته وتسليمه إليك.

blocks.text: HIS  WILL ?  THAT THING  IS  A  WEAPON , A  SWORD .
WHAT'S IMPORTANT  HERE  IS YOUR  WILL .
I  DO  NOT  WISH  TO USE  FORCE  AGAINST A  FRAGILE  YOUNG WOMAN .
blocks.translation: لا أرغب في استخدام القوة ضد امرأة شابة هشة.

blocks.text: IF  I  HAPPENED TO  TELL  YOU  I  WAS  THE MOST  POWERFUL PERSON  IN THE  WORLD ,  WOULD  YOUR ANSWER  REMAIN THE  SAME ?
blocks.translation: لو أخبرتك أنني أقوى شخص في العالم، هل ستظل إجابتك كما هي؟

blocks.text: OF  COURSE  MY ANSWER  WOULDN'T CHANGE .
IN  THAT CASE ,  MISS RIENNA ...
ли
BY  UNDERHANDED METHODS ,  DID HE  MEAN ... ?
TAP
SHH ...
HUSH ,  MY  LITTLE KITTEN .
YOU  SHOULD BE  MORE  CAREFUL ABOUT  SAYING SUCH  WORDS !
blocks.translation:
ينبغي أن تحذر أكثرُ
عند نطق مثل هذه الأقوال!

blocks.text: WHAT  WORDS ?
HUH ?
WEREN'T  YOU GOING  TO  PROPOSE A  CONTRACT MARRIAGE ?
WHY  WOULD YOU  SAY SOMETHING SO  ABSURD ?
WELL ,  YOU  DID SAY  " UNDERHANDED METHODS , "  DIDN'T YOU ?
AS  A  MARRIED  COUPLE , WE  WOULD  HAVE  COMMON OWNERSHIP  OVER  OUR POSSESSIONS ,
blocks.translation: كزوجين، سيكون لنا ملكية مشتركة على ممتلكاتنا،

blocks.text: AND  THE  ONLY LEGAL  WAY  TO  GET YOUR  HANDS  ON THIS SWORD ...
blocks.translation: وطريقة قانونية واحدة فقط للحصول على هذه السيف...

blocks.text: ... IS  THAT ,  RIGHT ?
To  be  continued
La Yeondam

blocks.translation: هذا العمل محمي بحقوق النشر ونمنع الاستخدام أو النسخ أو التوزيع أو المشاركة غير المصرح بها. وأي استخدام أو نسخ أو مشاركة غير مرخصة قد يعرض مرتكبها للعقوبات القانونية المتعلقة بحماية حقوق النشر والملكية الفكرية وغيرها.
